label: Generative adversarial networks

node.label: Generative adversarial networks
node.definition: A generative adversarial network trains a generator against a discriminator whose feedback pressures generated samples toward the data distribution.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Generative adversarial networks is to connect Adversarial minimax objectives, Adversarial examples & adversarial training to downstream capabilities including Image generation, editing & design.
examples: substrate for Image generation, editing & design
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial minimax objectives, Adversarial examples & adversarial training.

dependencies.rationale: Generative adversarial networks is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Adversarial minimax objectives.
Generative adversarial networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Adversarial examples & adversarial training.
Generative adversarial networks extends or specializes the architecture family Convolutional neural networks.
Generative adversarial networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
